textByHash.09c399aa5b691abeb3a677fd4f5fa260a571df12: And yet you yourself admit that Sliske poses a threat to us all. The prospect of working with Zamorakians gives me no pleasure, but it may be the only option.
textByHash.14e87d79208ca97d0c645fa3b3eae0f7308d4545: They will replace the knowledge you previously had, but you may switch between them by praying at the altar in this room at any time. May you use them well.
textByHash.15cea13f8e5261c3919a5113b444030de3cbcde5: There are many powerful artefacts in this world, but few are truly unknowable. This is one of those few. A relic that predates even the gods themselves.
textByHash.167b507df8db33ef3678925194390d58133245cb: No! My lord... what has become of you? I cannot hear your voice anymore!
textByHash.16a6b2d5b197c91ad26726a185ea6480a507143a: And on that note, I must leave you, my friend. May you walk in the shadow of the Empty Lord.
textByHash.1b1deb69c792647aa1c9c5396fe95dc9890ddab8: The Frostenhorn was one of three powerful items I was seeking. Together, they may have been my best chance to determine the fate of my lord.
textByHash.1c2e42f6ce5ef97bfe6f747a61900510b1ca0ce2: After our earlier encounter, I came to believe it might be here, but it seems I was mistaken.
textByHash.1ecde4edee52851d73dfa5721af79176b539e834: I understand you are in possession of a ring that lets you see into the Shadow Realm? Considering Sliske's mastery over that place, that is a power that will likely be of great use to you.
textByHash.25e99fcf61f7689beb8a5ae212515f0204a3e3a4: Hazeel. I thought I sensed someone lurking in the shadows. How long have you been here?
textByHash.341deffe41299b9ed61c9bfc2abd85b4087f8162: You do not know of the war for our survival? More time must have passed than I had thought...
textByHash.3849c02250f895ad387a8283b197b987018d0bcb: Tell me, what news of great Paddewwa? Do the shining spires of Lassar still stand? And what of glorious Annakarl? The fortress is still intact?
textByHash.3b78a4af351b97f773b779b118bce43df9a228e1: My friend, for your efforts in freeing me, I offer you the gift of knowledge. We Mahjarrat were once granted powerful ancient magicks by our lord. I now bestow their power upon you.
textByHash.3bd1502275de03b9458cd8e0bb8c00a0fc890e68: You should have contacted me, Sliske. You should have told me about the Horn.
textByHash.4999e0175f0f4bae796f144255efbe64b03e7a37: Then I fear the other artefacts will have met a similar fate.
textByHash.50a7842fcc5b663cb10a56d0a81cc544f7f43450: I did not show you the trust that you deserved. You freed me from my prison, a feat even my closest followers failed to achieve, and yet I doubted you.
textByHash.52e492d71ebc44ed50ef57e41147ec9ff5796cab: No need. I can summon it with ease.
textByHash.5cd2594bb69ad488af1ad4e8694fa926c880f1c0: Apparently not, though who could say why. I would never describe Sliske as a true believer, but until now, he always supported the Empty Lord.
textByHash.5d69814b67b012216d64bdfbc01f36c547179875: However, that is for another day. There are more immediate matters to concern myself with now. The Ritual of the Mahjarrat is fast approaching, and whatever Sliske is planning will happen there.
textByHash.5e7b1b08b288d2d5745ebd4edcd5c86707cb5d66: So my worst fears are confirmed. This may well be the darkest day for us since the fall of the Empty Lord.
textByHash.6353e6e988e597a1a4a035f55101e1a7cc112e6f: My apologies, but my subterfuge was necessary. There are far too many who would have tried to stop me recovering the Frostenhorn.
textByHash.637a6b1457f80eec07941ad33d83983f09944837: I had yet to track it down, but that does seem likely. It was stolen by Saradominists long ago.
textByHash.6fa55d8e70102a443a36684c697f15ea9d7d8698: Enakhra. You knew the Elder Horn was here?
textByHash.73e605bdeea490823de63585052b3de130620a12: Allow me to upgrade it with some offensive and defensive enchantments. They may well give you an important edge if you find yourself fighting in the shadows.
textByHash.75212242d1483de81da063a5eb1f84ad6904eeb1: You are well informed. Perhaps then you also know that the Horn was supposedly sent far to the east, which begs the question as to how it stands before us.
textByHash.77d50badc7025888db6a9433d3291abb10b5dd98: I did not know your allegiance, and so I was cautious, but it is clear that focusing on allegiances has blinded us. Sliske took advantage of that.
textByHash.897147beae6b4b0c7a6fdc042e81dcbe2925aa28: My thanks to you friend for your help in freeing me from this accursed place, but it seems I have much to do to make amends. If our empire no longer stands, then it means that we must have failed my lord.
textByHash.98dd0000c6f426fd294efcda09bd37056ec377c2: Two? We are not the fools you take us for, Enakhra. I can sense five Mahjarrat here, but I only see four.
textByHash.a76a129634ab9ef9632f150deec9abfab5128db9: How long have I been trapped here? Master... have you truly been dispatched from this world?
textByHash.aa57cdf19f4b77f2d5d5df4acf544ca199425bc0: Indeed, he himself was entrusted with another of the three artefacts. An icon that was kept under close guard by those wights of his.
textByHash.bb41b60521b97f6eda1bb609b1e0209c7b090497: Well, adventurer, it seems I owe you an apology.
textByHash.c76295282182b34b1cbd37f3efcf37758f37a368: Now, I must ask about the destruction of the Frostenhorn. Sliske's doing?
textByHash.cd78e3ae07cf321a2157555f679b0d741d85ec84: Since you freed me, I have been driven by a singular purpose. I exist for Zaros. I exist for the Empire. Sliske thinks he has destroyed that purpose, but I will not give up.
textByHash.ce6d17c5df3ab37731a17d2dc16d23e99805133b: It has had many names over many millennia, but to us, it was simply known as the Elder Horn.
textByHash.d3911a8d16f1ff67833c6f70bc90e5b78dd2c7ee: I trust that we shall meet again, but now I must leave you. Feel free to use the portal I shall create to return here easily in the future!
textByHash.d604cc49d954451f0d34faf1573671e5093cff73: I knew they could not trap me here for long! Well done, friend. Tell me, how goes the war?
textByHash.d63f83259c803d24eea03275fa67b04010230f54: A clever deception, although it does raise another question. If the Frostenhorn was never here, then where is it?
textByHash.d6427a7b2fabfcf82f7a96e41d553f7d39ea7701: You know as much as I that Sliske serves no one but himself. His actions are his own.
textByHash.d9ad4026595baafbe9db2fbf1eb7a390fa33a37d: I must ensure I am prepared, and while it may not have been your intention, you are part of this now. You must also ensure you are ready. To help with this, I have something to offer you.
textByHash.f028dedfeb6f4fb1f4ae52ef5a2cf1c7657e4f14: It grants absolute control. With this, one person has the power to bring entire armies to their knees, all without a single drop of blood being shed.
textByHash.f7c47ec994c37a83af5c4fe82bd0279ee7b77b53: You can blame me as much as you wish, Hazeel. It is irrelevant. Sliske now holds the Elder Horn and we must be ready to oppose him.
